# WRP Dubai - Premium Car Detailing

> Dubai's premium automotive detailing studio. Wrap, Reinforce, Protect.

WRP is a premium car detailing studio in Al Qusais Industrial Area 1, Dubai, UAE.
We specialize in Paint Protection Film (PPF), ceramic coating, paint polishing, window tinting, and premium car wash services.

## Services

- [Ceramic Coating](https://wrpdetailing.ae/services/ceramic-coating/): Nano-ceramic technology that creates a durable, hydrophobic shield, delivering long-lasting gloss and protection
- [Paint Protection Film](https://wrpdetailing.ae/services/paint-protection-film/): Military-grade protection that preserves your vehicle's pristine finish against Dubai's harshest elements
- [Paint Correction & Polish](https://wrpdetailing.ae/services/polish/): Expert paint correction that restores your vehicle's finish to showroom perfection
- [Premium Car Wash](https://wrpdetailing.ae/services/premium-car-wash/): Hand-wash perfection using luxury-grade products and techniques that preserve your vehicle's finish
- [Window Film](https://wrpdetailing.ae/services/window-film/): Advanced ceramic technology that transforms your driving experience in Dubai's intense heat

## Blog

- [Ceramic Coating in Dubai: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://wrpdetailing.ae/blog/ceramic-coating-dubai-guide/): Everything you need to know about ceramic coating in Dubai - how it works, what it costs, and why professional application matters in the UAE climate.
- [Is Paint Protection Film Worth It in Dubai? Costs, Benefits & Real Results](https://wrpdetailing.ae/blog/paint-protection-film-dubai/): A practical look at PPF in Dubai - real costs, how it handles the UAE climate, self-healing technology, and whether the investment pays off.
- [Paint Protection Film vs. Ceramic Coating: Which Does Your Car Need?](https://wrpdetailing.ae/blog/ppf-vs-ceramic-coating/): A side-by-side comparison of PPF and ceramic coating - protection level, cost, longevity, and when to choose one, the other, or both.

## Portfolio

- [Lotus Exige](https://wrpdetailing.ae/portfolio/burgundy-lotus/): Paint correction and ceramic coating for this striking burgundy Lotus Exige.
- [Porsche 911](https://wrpdetailing.ae/portfolio/green-porsche-911/): Complete ceramic coating and premium detailing service for this stunning green Porsche 911.
- [Lexus LX 570](https://wrpdetailing.ae/portfolio/lexus-lx-570/): Comprehensive detailing and ceramic coating for this luxury Lexus LX 570 SUV.
- [Porsche Boxster Spyder](https://wrpdetailing.ae/portfolio/porsche-boxster/): Complete PPF and ceramic coating package for this Porsche Boxster Spyder.
- [Subaru WRX STI](https://wrpdetailing.ae/portfolio/subaru-wrx-sti/): Full premium wash service with foam treatment and paint protection for this rally-bred WRX STI.
- [Premium Detailing Process](https://wrpdetailing.ae/portfolio/team-work-showcase/): Our expert team at work providing meticulous hand-wash and detailing services.
- [Toyota Supra & Lotus](https://wrpdetailing.ae/portfolio/toyota-supra-lotus/): Premium wash and detailing for showroom display vehicles.
- [Chevrolet Corvette](https://wrpdetailing.ae/portfolio/white-corvette/): Special event preparation detailing for showroom Corvette display.
